headline: Is Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Hartford Insurance Group at around US$134 per share still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in. The stock has recently seen a 3.3% decline over the last 7 days and is down 2.2% year to date, yet it still shows a 7.8% return over 1 year and over 100% across 3 and 5 years. Recent attention on Hartford Insurance Group has focused on its long term share price performance and how it compares with other insurance stocks, along with...
